heading: Flexible schedules; credit hours; accumulation and compensation
label: 6126 Flexible schedules; credit hours; accumulation and compensation

children.label: a
children.text: Subject to any limitation prescribed by the Office of Personnel Management or the agency, a full-time employee on a flexible schedule can accumulate not more than 24 credit hours, and a part-time employee can accumulate not more than one-fourth of the hours in such employee’s biweekly basic work requirement, for carryover from a biweekly pay period to a succeeding biweekly pay period for credit to the basic work requirement for such period.
in the case of a full-time employee, not more than 24 credit hours accumulated by such employee, or
in the case of a part-time employee, the number of credit hours (not in excess of one-fourth of the hours in such employee’s biweekly basic work requirement) accumulated by such employee.
